title: Department Store
writer: H.F. Maltby, E. Vivian Edmonds, H. Fowler Mear
actors: Jack Melford, Sebastian Shaw, Garry Marsh
plot: The heir to a department store goes undercover through menial jobs. A crooked manager hires an ex-convict unaware he's an impostor. Mistaken identity ensues as the heir and ex-convict are confused for each other while working at t...
